scripts.build: vite build --outDir dist/client && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.tsx --outDir dist/server && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.typegen: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('npx', ['pocketbase-typegen', '--url', process.env.VITE_POCKETBASE_URL, '--email', process.env.POCKETBASE_ADMIN_EMAIL, '--password', process.env.POCKETBASE_ADMIN_PASSWORD, '--out', 'src/services/db/pocketbase-types.ts'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
